title: Slurm Driver Workflow Request
description: Payload accepted by the compute-slurm create-workflow endpoint. The service requires cwlWorkflow, cwlJobInputs, and jobs. The CWL objects are passed through to cwl-docker-extract and toil-cwl-runner, so this schema intentionally treats them as opaque objects.

id.description: Optional workflow identifier. If omitted, the driver attempts to read the id from cwlWorkflow.id.

cwlWorkflow.description: A standards-compliant CWL Workflow document, including any supported extensions.

cwlJobInputs.description: CWL job inputs/yaml_inputs payload passed through to the workflow runner.

computeConfig.description: Optional compute service configuration grouped by concern.

toilConfig.description: Toil runner configuration applied to the outer toil-cwl-runner command.

logLevel.description: Value passed to toil-cwl-runner --logLevel. Default: INFO.

outputConfig.description: Output placement configuration for the outer toil-cwl-runner invocation.

mode.description: Controls whether compute-slurm uses a service-managed --outdir, a user-specified --outdir, or omits --outdir entirely.

outputDir.description: Workflow output directory passed to toil-cwl-runner --outdir when mode is userSpecified.

jobName.description: SLURM job name. Defaults to the resolved workflow id.

slurmJobGpuCount.description: GPU count provisioned for the outer sbatch wrapper job.

output.description: SLURM stdout file path/pattern. Default: slurm-{workflowId}.out.

error.description: SLURM stderr file path/pattern. Default: slurm-{workflowId}.err.

memory.description: Overall SLURM memory allocation used for #SBATCH --mem. Default: 8G.

jobs.description: Required compatibility object. Include an empty object when no job-level compatibility fields are needed.
